input:
Bug report (moq.analyzers issue #1081): Pre-push git hook fails with PowerShell parse error, blocking all pushes:

```
Running tech debt marker scan...
At build/scripts/todo-scanner/Scan-TodoComments.ps1:1 char:1
+ <#
+ ~~
The terminator '#>' is missing from the multiline comment.
at <ScriptBlock>, .githooks/hooks/Invoke-PrePush.ps1: line 21
```

Impact: all pushes blocked unless bypassed with --no-verify. What is the most likely root cause and the cheapest first check?
